title: sparefixd for Hotpoint Fridge Freezer Glass Shelf & White Trim 434 X 292 X 4mm
features: See description below for full list of models this part fits. The model number is normally found inside the fridge or freezer. You will likely need to remove the salad drawer or freezer drawer to find the model number plate. Otherwise the model number is likely to be on the side or rear of the appliance. The model number will usually be printed or stamped on to a sticker or plate and will consist of numbers and letters
